title: Pirates!
description: Sail the seven seas! but we dont want the normal rowing boats, instead you can sail on small cogs/brigs or sail on MASSIVE pirate galleons! Plunder or FIGHT! naval? ok! hand to hand/ranged? aye aye cap!
body:
Sail the seas on small cogs/brigs with the help of small ships! those to small and the cannons dont have enough firepower? ok, Sail on MASSIVE pirate galleons with a million different kinds of ships you can sail on the waves with the help of VS eureka! have close quarters dispenser cannons on your ships with simple cannonballs! or have massive cannons with different ammo types with create! big cannons. the ammo types include: standart shots, AP shots, mortar stones, grapeshots, HE shots and fluid shots to name most. MANY different types of reasons to sail out on the sea. Plunder, sail or PVP? no problem! the pvp in this has a million different opportunities to have!
Naval? ok! hand to hand on crossbars or bowsprits? absolutly! naval in cogs or brigs (galleys and drakkars are trash lol) have your fun! rowboat v rowboat? not the best choice but hey, whatever floats your boat (lol)!
